title: Lao G Falls
description: Pages 14–18 focus on lao g falls, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Sai, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sai's battle, Baby 5's crisis, and the collapse of old loyalties shift another part of Dressrosa away from Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I was just trying to be of use to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Has no one ever tried to refuse your help before!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Therefore, I'm not

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Look! Don chinjao's drill head actually got bent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: IMPOS- SIBLE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: compared to see if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE IT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Did... I do this?

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: SAI... you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How skillfully you bent my drill head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are they gonna have a falling out!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Your power has finally awakened!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The blood, sweat and tears of your training have finally borne fruit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The secret technique of hasshouken has been passed on!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Sai... I bestow the name of drill dragon drill nail unto your martial leg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now, that leg of yours ought to be able to Shatter even the ice continent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Gramps...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Happou Navy is now completely yours! The fiancee business...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Is also over and done with! You are free to choose whomever you wish!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Truth is... ever since my fight with straw hat, my illness has been acting up. I just can't fight the way I used to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I've grown quite old... and that's why I'm glad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: that you've...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: carved seal of G!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Bughh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Gahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: L- Lao G-Sama!?

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: Whoaa! Lao G-SAMA has defeated Don Chinao!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Earth Sage Fist, Ultimate Secret Tech- Nique!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Combat Insurance!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: For when you've gotten sick or wounded or old!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: A QIGONG technique that saves and stores your muscular strength from your youth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: This technique is tried and true! My power is as it was in its heyday*!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Who could possibly defeat me now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And they are all slaves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: As long as I live, I won't let a single one of you fools out of this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Cage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: G!

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: Monkey from the flower country! I won't let you have baby 5!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Just to be needed, she will put even her life on the line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Could there possibly be a more convenient woman than her!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Just you wait, baby S! I'll spill this fool's blood and come get you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Well, if that's how it's gotta go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Conven- lent...!?

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: If I win, I'll take you as my wife!

summary: Lao G Falls advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Sai, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
